name: polymath-connector-aws
description: AWS connector: cli-only wrapper around `aws` for resource inspection — describe, IAM-effective-permissions check, cost ping.

awsProfile.title: AWS named profile
awsProfile.description: Profile from ~/.aws/credentials or ~/.aws/config. Prefer per-account profiles over a default catch-all.

awsRegion.title: Default AWS region
awsRegion.description: Default region for resource inspection (e.g. us-east-1, eu-west-1).
